title: Keckiella breviflora
taxonomy: Keckiella breviflora is classified within the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is part of the genus Keckiella, which belongs to the order Lamiales. The species Keckiella breviflora is a shrub native to the southwestern regions of North America. It is often found growing in areas with well-drained soil and full sun exposure. Within the taxonomic hierarchy, Keckiella breviflora is a species within the kingdom Plantae.
properties: Keckiella breviflora, also known as the short-flowered keckiella, is a plant species that has been studied for its potential therapeutic properties. Research suggests that extracts from this plant may have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. However, more studies are needed to fully understand its medicinal applications. Traditional uses of Keckiella breviflora have been reported, but these are not scientifically verified. Further research is necessary to confirm its potential therapeutic uses.
constituents: Keckiella breviflora, also known as short-flowered keckiella, is a plant species that contains various active constituents. These constituents include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its medicinal properties. Further research is needed to fully understand the specific active constituents present in Keckiella breviflora. parts: Keckiella breviflora, also known as short-flowered keckiella, is a flowering plant species.
